data.title: Nvidia And Eli Lilly Spend $1Bn On New Join Lab Over Five Years
data.description:
Nvidia and US pharma giant Eli Lilly will spend $1 billion building a new joint research ​lab in the San Francisco Bay Area over five years using Vera Rubin AI chips.
source: https://catenaa.com/industries/health/nvidia-and-eli-lilly-spend-1bn-on-new-join-lab-over-five-years/

data.title: Zuckerberg announces new top-level initiative – Meta Compute
data.description:
Facebook and Instagram parent company Meta Platforms CEO Mark Zuckerberg has announced the creation of a new initiative known as Meta Compute for the construction of tens of gigawatts of compute infrastructure this decade. In a series of posts on Threads, Zuckerberg revealed that the “top-level initiative” will see the development of hundreds more gigawatts in […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/zuckerberg-announces-new-unit-meta-compute/

data.title: Potential Fed Chair Candidate Advocates for Interest Rate Reduction
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Rick Rieder, the Chief Investment Officer at BlackRock and a potential candidate for the Federal Reserve Chair, has stated that the Federal Reserve needs to lower interest rates to 3%.

data.title: Ethereum Shouldn't Delay Preparing for Quantum Computing Threat, Says Vitalik Buterin
data.description:

source: https://decrypt.co/354304/ethereum-shouldnt-delay-preparing-quantum-threat-says-vitalik-buterin

data.title: FalconX Transfers 2000 ETH to Hot Wallet
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham indicates that at 03:30, 2000 ETH were transferred from FalconX to its hot wallet.
